creator: dewayne.geraghty@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Perl 5.16.3 and perl 5.8.1 builds and installs correctly.  However during package creation/deletion, the plist is expecting to use gz files. unfortunately they don't exist (e.g. +%%MAN3%%/vmsish.3.gz).

cd /usr/ports/lang/perl5.16 &&  make -DBATCH package
..
tar: lib/perl5/5.16/perl/man/man3/vmsish.3.gz: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/perl5/5.16/perl/man/man3/warnings.3.gz: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/perl5/5.16/perl/man/man3/warnings::register.3.gz: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256

===>>> Package creation of perl-5.16.3_1 failed
===>>> Aborting update

The differences can be seen from 
cd /usr/ports/lang/perl5.16 && svn diff  -r {20131003}:{20131004}
..
+%%MAN3%%/vmsish.3.gz
+%%MAN3%%/warnings.3.gz
+%%MAN3%%/warnings::register.3.gz
+%%GDBM%%%%MAN3%%/GDBM_File.3.gz
..

How-To-Repeat: Update your ports tree as of Mon Oct  7 12:33:49 UTC 2013
cd /usr/ports/lang/perl5.16 && make package

Similarly for perl5.18
